title: A2rchitech Task Template Definition Schema
description: Schema for defining A2rchitech task templates that compile to frozen kernel contracts

version.description: Version of the task template definition schema

id.description: Unique identifier for the task template

name.description: Human-readable name for the task template

description.description: Description of the task template purpose and function

time_budget.description: Default time budget in seconds, maps to NodeConstraints.time_budget

required_permissions.description: Required permissions for execution, maps to NodeConstraints.required_permissions

input_schema.description: JSON Schema for task inputs, maps to ToolABI.input_schema

output_schema.description: JSON Schema for task outputs, maps to ToolABI.output_schema

verification_schema.description: Schema for verification artifacts, maps to VerifyArtifact requirements
